reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Muy Linda y cómoda la Estación!! Los chicos de la playa excelente atención! Javier un maestro dando soluciones a los que somos turistas!! 100% recomendable!!

(Translated by Google)
The station is very nice and comfortable!! The beach staff provided excellent service! Javier is a master at helping us tourists!! 100% recommended!!

reviews.comment:
En horas pico son pocos los playeros para la cantidad de surtidores habilitados.
Un playero debe estar abocado solo a las motos dado que es una fila continua.

(Translated by Google)
During peak hours, there are too few attendants for the number of pumps in operation. Each attendant should be dedicated solely to motorcycles, given the continuous line.

reviews.comment:
Mal servicio! No lo recomiendo cuando uno pide factura A y pagar con la app YPF. Se niegan a darte comprobante diciendo que si pagaba con la app me daban tiket consumidor final. Destacando que ellos trabajan así. Así que no me quisieron vender

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service! I don't recommend them when you request an invoice and want to pay with the YPF app. They refuse to give you a receipt, saying that if you pay with the app they'll give you a final consumer ticket. They emphasize that this is how they operate. So they wouldn't sell to me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15009815123652831665/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwc0pDNzV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Lástima que no cuente con servicio para inflar o calibrar las ruedas.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. It's a shame they don't offer tire inflation or calibration services.
